responseText:
Based on your Rivian R1S "ToughNut" data from February 27 to March 8, 2026, here's a comprehensive summary of the 10-day period:

## **10-Day Activity Summary (Feb 27 - Mar 8, 2026)**

### **Overall Statistics**
- **Total Distance**: 1,077.9 miles across 74 drives
- **Total Charging**: 669.7 kWh across 17 sessions
- **Average Efficiency**: 64%
- **Total Drive Time**: 24.9 hours (89,807 seconds)

### **Daily Breakdown**
| Date | Distance | Drives | Efficiency | Charging (kWh) | Charges |
|------|----------|--------|------------|----------------|---------|
| Feb 27 | 118.4 mi | 10 | 62% | 17.2 | 2 |
| Feb 28 | 70.8 mi | 4 | 71% | 122.7 | 3 |
| Mar 1 | 131.1 mi | 5 | 62% | - | - |
| Mar 2 | 160.7 mi | 8 | 65% | 195.3 | 3 |
| Mar 3 | 158.9 mi | 9 | 61% | 59.8 | 2 |
| Mar 4 | 206.0 mi | 5 | 68% | 108.2 | 2 |
| Mar 5 | 96.2 mi | 10 | 72% | 118.2 | 2 |
| Mar 6 | 65.7 mi | 13 | 54% | 33.8 | 2 |
| Mar 7 | 10.0 mi | 4 | 44% | 14.5 | 1 |
| Mar 8 | 60.2 mi | 6 | 61% | - | - |

---

## **Narrative: A Vermont-New Hampshire Road Trip Adventure**

### **February 27-28: The Journey North Begins**
Your trip started on **February 27** with activity in **Bennington, VT** and **Plymouth, VT**, where you made two charging stops. You added 69 miles of range with a DC fast charge in Bennington ($16.89), then topped up overnight in Plymouth with 93 miles of range. The next day (Feb 28), you continued north to **Ludlow, VT**, where you spent the night charging 139 miles of range at a Level 2 charger.

### **March 1-2: The Return Journey South**
On **March 1**, you made a significant DC fast charge in **North Canaan, CT** ($17.73 for 69 miles of range), then returned home to Cornwall, CT for an overnight charge that added 224 miles of range. 

**March 2** marked the most intensive charging day: you spent over 11 hours charging in **Dover, VT**, adding 208 miles of range. This suggests an extended stay or multiple activities in the Dover area.

### **March 3-4: The Northern Loop**
This was the peak of your road trip. On **March 3**, you charged in **West Lebanon, NH** (135 miles added) and made a quick top-up in **Dover, VT**. 

**March 4** was your most active travel day (206 miles driven) with three DC fast charges:
- **Montpelier, VT**: 97 miles added (215 kW peak)
- **Lebanon, NH**: 148 miles added (218 kW peak)  
- **Holyoke, MA**: 183 miles added (215 kW peak) - **FREE charging!**

This three-stop DC fast charging sequence suggests you were completing a loop through Vermont, New Hampshire, and Massachusetts, likely returning home to Cornwall, CT.

### **March 5-6: Settling Back Home**
Back in **Cornwall, CT**, you charged twice on March 5 (118 kWh total) and March 6 (34 kWh). Your driving became more local, with 13 short trips around Cornwall and Torrington, CT on March 6 alone, covering 65.7 miles.

### **March 7-8: Light Local Activity**
The final two days were minimal: just 10 miles on March 7 (four short trips) and 60 miles on March 8 (six trips around Litchfield, Sharon, and Cornwall, CT). Your last drive on March 8 was a 14.9-mile trip from Litchfield to Cornwall.

---

## **Notable Highlights**
- **Longest single day**: March 4 with 206 miles driven
- **Most charging**: March 2 with 195.3 kWh added
- **Best efficiency day**: March 5 at 72%
- **Free DC fast charging**: 183 miles added in Holyoke, MA (March 4)
- **Total spent on charging**: ~$48.38 (mostly on March 1 and Feb 27)
- **Temperatures**: Ranged from 0°F to 59°F during drives, with most trips in the low 30s°F

This was clearly a **multi-day road trip through Vermont and New Hampshire**, with you spending several days in the Dover/Ludlow area before looping back through Montpelier and Lebanon, finally returning to your Cornwall, CT home base around March 4-5.
